tools.name: get_document
tools.description: Retrieve Google Doc content and metadata.

tools.name: get_document_text
tools.description: Retrieve the document's plain text content.

tools.name: batch_update
tools.description: Send a documents.batchUpdate request to modify a Doc (insertText, replaceAllText, structural updates, etc).

tools.name: append_text
tools.description: Append plain text to the end of the document.

tools.name: replace_all_text
tools.description: Replace all occurrences of text matching a query.

tools.name: style_first_match
tools.description: Find the first occurrence of text and apply a TextStyle to it.

tools.name: insert_text_after_first_match
tools.description: Find the first occurrence of text and insert new text after or before it.

tools.name: insert_table_after_first_match
tools.description: Find the first occurrence of text and insert a table nearby.

tools.name: insert_page_break_after_first_match
tools.description: Find the first occurrence of text and insert a page break nearby.

tools.name: insert_inline_image_after_first_match
tools.description: Find the first occurrence of text and insert an inline image nearby.

tools.name: delete_first_match
tools.description: Find the first occurrence of text and delete it.

tools.name: update_paragraph_style_for_first_match
tools.description: Find the first occurrence of text and update the paragraph style for that paragraph.

tools.name: update_document_style
tools.description: Update the document style (e.g., page size, margins).
